company_info.description: Tera Technology, Inc. operates as an information technology consulting company that offers information system construction, operation, and maintenance services in Japan. The company provides various IT services including software development, infrastructure construction, and operation and maintenance services. The company offers services for business in five areas including public, communications, information services, finance, and manufacturing and others. The company's services for the public include electronic application system for local governments, claims reception system for nursing care businesses, government comprehensive information system, electronic approval system, public institution big data business support, and grant application system. It offers various system development projects for the telecommunications carrier industry, such as network maintenance and content distribution. The company caters to information system industry by providing services, such as TV shopping EC site development, e-commerce website development for individuals/corporations, magazine production support system, point service system for department stores, courier delivery status management system, membership site for medical professionals, customer management system for cosmetics manufacturers, infrastructure construction for cloud service providers, migrating existing systems to the cloud, and core system for providers. Additionally, it offers software development services for banks, insurance, and investment companies. It also engages in the development of software for various manufacturing companies including automotive, medical equipment, industrial equipment, and electronics. The company was formerly known as Terra International Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tera Technology, Inc. in February 2016. Tera Technology, Inc. was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Toshima, Japan.
